OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The token of the user who represents the connector in the OpenCTI platform.

CONNECTOR_SCOPE.description: The scope or type of data the connector is importing, either a MIME type or Stix Object (for information only).

CONNECTOR_TYPE.description: Should always be set to INTERNAL_ENRICHMENT for this connector.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: Determines the verbosity of the logs.

CONNECTOR_AUTO.description: Enables or disables automatic enrichment of observables. The keyless community API is rate limited (2/s, 25/hour per IP); keep disabled or configure an API key before enabling on busy platforms.

XPOSEDORNOT_API_KEY.description: Optional XposedOrNot API key (console.xposedornot.com). When set, the connector uses the commercial Plus API with higher rate limits. The connector is fully functional without it.

XPOSEDORNOT_API_BASE_URL.description: Base URL of the free XposedOrNot community API.

XPOSEDORNOT_MAX_TLP.description: Maximum TLP of an observable the connector is allowed to enrich. The observable's email address is sent to the XposedOrNot API.

XPOSEDORNOT_TLP_LEVEL.description: Traffic Light Protocol (TLP) level applied to the objects imported into OpenCTI. Results contain personal data; a restrictive TLP is recommended.
